proposition: Vít Schlesinger holds an undisclosed concurrent shareholding in Ventoux Studio s.r.o. (IČO 23749636), registered since 22 September 2025 — about two months after the Blackfish acquisition closed — which is not mentioned in any Able.cz-related media coverage reviewed.
